comparison_subject_model: at least two public-safe subjects with kind/status/label/limitations
comparison_type_taxonomy: identity, version, source coverage, representation, member, compatibility, evidence, provenance, action, conflict, absence, candidate review
comparison_criteria_model: descriptive or categorical criteria; no production scoring
identity_same_as_different_from_model: same_as, likely_same, variant_of, different, conflicting, unknown; destructive merge false
compatibility_comparison_model: scoped compatibility relations with evidence requirement
absence_near_miss_gap_comparison_model: scoped absence and explicit gaps; global absence false
result_card_object_source_projection: future projection only; no public search mutation
static_demo_projection: no generated static demo in P81
privacy_policy_summary: public-safe synthetic examples with no private paths, secrets, IPs, account IDs, or raw payloads
no_winner_without_evidence_policy: winner claims disabled unless future scoped evidence policy approves
